macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: 007 First Light becomes IO Interactive’s fastest-selling game
items.summary: IO Interactive says 007 First Light sold more than 1.5 million copies in its first 24 hours, making it the studio’s fastest-selling game ever. The milestone makes it one of the biggest launches in the current wave of new releases.

items.title: The Witcher 3 is getting a new expansion, Songs of the Past
items.summary: CD Projekt has announced a new third expansion for The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt, with Geralt returning in a new storyline scheduled for 2027. The expansion is being developed alongside Fool’s Theory for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC.

items.title: Valve raises Steam Deck OLED prices
items.summary: Valve has increased Steam Deck OLED prices, with reports attributing the change to rising component costs and supply-chain pressure. The pricing shift arrives as the handheld market remains highly competitive ahead of new devices shown at Computex.

items.title: Xbox Game Pass changes reportedly improved subscriptions and retention
items.summary: Industry reporting cited in gaming coverage says recent Xbox Game Pass pricing and policy adjustments led to better subscription growth and retention. The move is being watched closely as Microsoft continues to refine the service’s strategy.

items.title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 officially announced
items.summary: Activision has reportedly confirmed Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4, with coverage saying the game will skip PS4 and arrive on Switch 2. The announcement adds another major entry to the year’s shooter lineup.

items.title: Fable delayed to 2027
items.summary: Microsoft’s Fable reboot has been pushed back to February 2027, according to gaming news coverage. The delay makes room for more development time on one of Xbox’s flagship first-party projects.

items.title: Balatro publisher Playstack sold to Fandom’s parent company
items.summary: Playstack, the publisher behind Balatro, is being sold to Fandom’s parent company for $151 million subject to approval. The deal is one of the notable gaming business developments reported in the last day.

items.title: Donkey Kong 64 is coming to Nintendo Switch Online
items.summary: Nintendo is adding Donkey Kong 64 to the Switch Online N64 library next month, marking another classic first-party release for the service. The game will be the 43rd N64 title available through Nintendo Classics.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
